articles.original_title: Lakers Have Clean Injury Report For Game 1 Against Rockets Outside Of Luka Doncic & Austin Reaves
articles.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers’ injury report for Game 1 of their first round playoff series against the Houston Rockets is exactly as expected. Luka Doncic (left hamstring strain) and Austin Reaves (left oblique muscle strain) are out, but the rest of the roster is good to go for the start of the postseason. Meanwhile, the […]

articles.title: Suns end Warriors' season, await No. 1 Thunder
articles.original_title: Suns end Warriors' season, await No. 1 Thunder
articles.summary: The Suns knocked out the Warriors 111-96 on Friday night to secure the No. 8 seed and will face the top-seeded Thunder in the first round of the playoffs.

articles.title: Kerr on future: These jobs have 'expiration dates'
articles.original_title: Kerr on future: These jobs have 'expiration dates'
articles.summary: Steve Kerr acknowledged his future with the Warriors was uncertain following Friday's season-ending loss to the Suns, saying, "When the run ends, sometimes it's time for new blood and new ideas."

articles.title: Magic, driven by 'urgency,' rip Hornets to advance
articles.original_title: Magic, driven by 'urgency,' rip Hornets to advance
articles.summary: The Orlando Magic built a 35-point lead in the first half of their 121-90 rout of the Charlotte Hornets in a play-in tournament game Friday night and advanced to a first-round playoff matchup against the Detroit Pistons.

articles.title: Rockets list KD (knee) as questionable for Game 1
articles.original_title: Rockets list KD (knee) as questionable for Game 1
articles.summary: Kevin Durant sustained a right knee contusion during practice this week, but the Rockets are optimistic it will not be a significant issue during their first-round playoff series against the Lakers, a source told ESPN.

articles.title: Frank: Clippers' goal remains to 'win with Kawhi'

articles.summary: LA Clippers president of basketball operations Lawrence Frank reaffirmed the team's commitment to Kawhi Leonard long-term at his end-of-season news conference Friday.

articles.title: Steve Kerr, was this your final game as the Warriors' head coach? 'I don't know.'
articles.original_title: Steve Kerr, was this your final game as the Warriors' head coach? 'I don't know.'
articles.summary: "I don't know what's going to happen. I still love coaching, but I get it. These jobs all have an expiration date."

articles.title: Jalen Green shakes off injury-filled year, peaking at the right time for playoff-bound Suns
articles.original_title: Jalen Green shakes off injury-filled year, peaking at the right time for playoff-bound Suns
articles.summary: Jalen Green was several feet behind the 3-point line as the shot clock wound down and didn't have many options, so the Phoenix guard simply squared up and let if fly.  The 24-year-old Green scored 36 points to lead Phoenix to a 111-96 victory over the Golden State Warriors in the NBA's play-in tournament.  The Suns earned the No. 8 seed in the Western Conference playoffs and they'll face the defending champion Oklahoma City Thunder in a road game Sunday in Game 1 of the first round.
